MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Nov-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Nov-30-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John R. Hillsman, Esq. of McGuinn, Hillsman & Palefsky, Tel. 415.421.9292, for defendants and moving party;
James C. Nielsen, Esq. of Nielsen, Haley & Abbott LLP, Tel 415.248.0162, for plalintiff and opposing party;
Michelle L. Tomney, Esq. of Gibson Robb & Lindh LLP, Tel.415.348.6000, for defendants Starr Indemnity, etc., by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court would like to see if there is an overlap between this case and the Alameda case. Therefore, pursuant to the parties' stipulation, the court ordered that, (1) DEFENDANTS JAMES GRUPINSKI, JACK WHITE, JASON GRUPINSKI, CORI GRUPINSKI's MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS is continued to November 30, 2017 to be heard with plaintiff's Motion For Judgment on the Pleadings. No further briefings are allowed for the Motion To Stay, and (2) PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, currently scheduled for November 27, 2017, is continued to November 30, 2017. Opposition(s) to this motion are due 11/15; reply papers are due 11/27. Courtesy copies of all papers must be delivered to Dept. 302 no later than 11/27.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org.
